expectations.text: Checked BOTH GitHub releases AND tags for biomejs (where they are known to diverge)
expectations.evidence: The executor fetched api.github.com/repos/biomejs/biome/releases/latest AND api.github.com/repos/biomejs/pre-commit/tags in parallel. The tags check revealed the divergence (releases/latest returns stale v0.6.1, tags show v2.4.8) and this was explicitly documented in the report's Verification Note.

expectations.text: Read or searched for the changelog between v2.4.4 and the latest version
expectations.evidence: Three sources consulted: biomejs.dev/internals/changelog/, github.com/biomejs/biome/releases, and the specific tag release page for 2.4.8. Content confirmed: no breaking changes, LSP crash fix, new nursery rules.

expectations.text: Checked for biomejs security advisories via WebSearch
expectations.evidence: Two checks: WebSearch 'biomejs biome CVE security advisory 2025 2026' returned no CVEs, and WebFetch of github.com/advisories?query=biomejs returned 'No results matched your search'.

expectations.text: Presented findings using the decision format with all required fields
expectations.evidence: report.md contains all required fields: Risk level (ROUTINE), Verified via, Latest version, What changed, Breaking changes, Migration steps, Security advisories, Recommendation, Your call.

expectations.text: Assessed whether the existing biome.json config needs changes for the new version
expectations.evidence: Every key in the biome.json was explicitly evaluated against 2.4.8. The executor also fetched the noImportantStyles rule page and ran a deprecation search to confirm validity.
